## The problem

What gap or friction does this feature address? Describe the use case.

## Proposed solution

What would you like rowplay to do? Be as specific as you can.

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds or alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Scope

- [ ] Available in demo mode
- [ ] Requires connected Concept2 account
- [ ] Server-side change (API, DB, KV)
- [ ] Client-side only

## Additional context

Screenshots, sketches, or links to similar features elsewhere are welcome.
